# Description

## Background Information 

In the folder "Microsoft Entra Verified ID" there is al the material that I have studied and that has been used to produce the first part of a technical article about Decentralized Identity Systems.

The published article is found at the following URL: https://www.neteye-blog.com/blog/2026/06/19/decentralized-identity-systems-concepts/ 
with the title "Decentralized Identity Systems Concepts".

The file "2026-Blog-Verified-ID-02-WordPress-improved-by-PICO.txt" contains the latest revision of the part-1 published article in plain text format. 
I achieved this revision by iterations, working on al the available sources in the folder "Microsoft Entra Verified ID", including the YouTube videos
and applying AI tools such as NotebookLM and Perplexity until I have reached a satisfactory rusult.

## The main task in this specification

I would like to write the part-2 article as a follow-up of the part-1 article [Decentralized Identity Systems Concepts](https://www.neteye-blog.com/blog/2026/06/19/decentralized-identity-systems-concepts/).

The focus of the part-1 article [Decentralized Identity Systems Concepts](https://www.neteye-blog.com/blog/2026/06/19/decentralized-identity-systems-concepts/) is to introduce and clarify the most important concepts about Decentralized Identity Systems and to provide analogies and example applications in the real world, avoiding getting into the technical details of how things work under the hood.

The focus of the part-2 article, for which I do not have a title yet, should be to build on the part-1 article and provide the technical details of how Decentralized Identity Systems work under the hood.

## The main sources for this specification

[AZ-500-SC-100-Understanding and Using Verifiable Credentials - John Savill](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BxLSSH_EHjo&t=4834s)   
[Defeat Deep Fakes and Imposters with Verified ID and Face Check - John Savill](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=58j2PLW-M5k&t=8s)   
[What is Face Check with Microsoft Entra Verified ID? Microsoft Mechanics](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ic6P1mEsYLI)  
[Microsoft Entra Verified ID documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/verified-id/)  
[Decentralized Identity Systems Concepts](https://www.neteye-blog.com/blog/2026/06/19/decentralized-identity-systems-concepts/)

## The main sources for this specification

I would like the part-1 article to 

1. Follow the tone and the clarity of [Decentralized Identity Systems Concepts](https://www.neteye-blog.com/blog/2026/06/19/decentralized-identity-systems-concepts/)
2. Have link to the relevant documentation from [Microsoft Entra Verified ID documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/verified-id/) or any other relevant sources that can be found online
3. Use images where useful to explain or clarify concepts, flows or mechanism - I may later proiduce images manually using Google Drawing but you can include images from the web that I would base my images on.
